title: Israeli troops push into Lebanon for yet another war with Iran's proxy Hezbollah
summary_full: The BBC sees troops and tanks massing near the border, as speculation mounts that Israel is planning a full-scale ground invasion to fight Hezbollah.
summary_public: The BBC sees troops and tanks massing near the border, as speculation mounts that Israel is planning a full-scale ground invasion to fight Hezbollah.
